file_preview.file_changed_with_edits: File changed on disk. You have unsaved edits — reloading will discard them.
file_preview.search_placeholder: Search in file... (Enter: next, Shift+Enter: prev)
file_preview.binary_file_description: This file cannot be displayed as text.
file_preview.unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred in the application. You can try to recover or reload the app.

wizard_errors.timeout_description: The agent stopped producing output for an extended period. This usually means the agent process crashed or lost its connection to the AI provider. Try again — if the issue persists, check your API key and network connection.
wizard_errors.not_available_description: The AI agent could not be started. Please check that it is properly installed and configured.
wizard_errors.session_error_description: The wizard session is no longer active. Please restart the wizard.
wizard_errors.spawn_failed_description: Could not start the AI agent. Please check your configuration and try again.
wizard_errors.agent_error_description: The AI agent encountered an error and stopped unexpectedly.
wizard_errors.parse_error_description: Could not understand the response from the AI. Please try rephrasing your message.
wizard_errors.generic_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

batch.view_error_tooltip: View error details in Auto Run tab
batch.waiting_to_stop: Waiting for current task to complete before stopping...

queued_items.remove_message: This message will be removed from the queue and will not be sent.

group_chat_right_panel.no_participants_hint: Ask the moderator to add agents.

apprentice_conductor.name: Apprentice Conductor
apprentice_conductor.description: Just learning baton technique, cueing, and score reading. Assists rehearsals and may conduct small sections.
apprentice_conductor.flavor_text: Every maestro starts with their first downbeat. You've taken the podium.
apprentice_conductor.example_achievement: Started as a youth orchestra conductor at age 18 in Venezuela

assistant_conductor.name: Assistant Conductor
assistant_conductor.description: Supports the main conductor at a professional orchestra. Leads rehearsals and covers when needed. The first real step into professional conducting.
assistant_conductor.flavor_text: You've proven you can step in when the maestro needs you. The orchestra is starting to trust your cues.
assistant_conductor.example_achievement: Assistant conductor to Leonard Bernstein at Tanglewood

associate_conductor.name: Associate Conductor
associate_conductor.description: A trusted lieutenant who regularly conducts concerts, outreach programs, or B-series performances.
associate_conductor.flavor_text: The musicians look to you with confidence. Your interpretation is developing its own voice.
associate_conductor.example_achievement: Associate conductor at the Rotterdam Philharmonic before rising to Music Director

resident_conductor.name: Resident Conductor
resident_conductor.description: Officially part of the artistic leadership team. Conducts full concerts, sometimes entire seasons. Has steady command of an orchestra's artistic identity.
resident_conductor.flavor_text: The orchestra knows your style. Your presence on the podium brings focused energy to every rehearsal.
resident_conductor.example_achievement: Resident conductor of the Dallas Symphony before becoming Music Director of the NY Philharmonic

principal_guest_conductor.name: Principal Guest Conductor
principal_guest_conductor.description: Not employed full-time but invited repeatedly. Signals prestige and a strong artistic relationship with the orchestra.
principal_guest_conductor.flavor_text: Orchestras across the world are taking notice. Your guest appearances are the highlight of their season.
principal_guest_conductor.example_achievement: Principal Guest Conductor of the Philharmonia Orchestra while leading LA Phil

chief_conductor.name: Chief Conductor
chief_conductor.description: The equivalent of "head coach." Primary artistic vision holder who leads the majority of programs.
chief_conductor.flavor_text: You command the artistic direction. Your vision shapes every performance the orchestra gives.
chief_conductor.example_achievement: Chief Conductor of the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig and Music Director of the Boston Symphony

music_director.name: Music Director
music_director.description: The apex of standard titles. Sets long-term artistic direction, hires musicians, and plans entire seasons. The ultimate orchestral leadership position.
music_director.flavor_text: The orchestra is your instrument. You shape not just performances, but the very culture of music-making.
music_director.example_achievement: Music Director of the Berlin Philharmonic for 16 years, transforming its repertoire

maestro_emeritus.name: Maestro Emeritus
maestro_emeritus.description: An honorific status for legendary figures who shaped an orchestra. Still guest-conducts, but with legacy-level reverence.
maestro_emeritus.flavor_text: Your legacy is written into the DNA of the orchestras you've led. Standing ovations greet your every appearance.
maestro_emeritus.example_achievement: Conductor Laureate of multiple orchestras after decades of transformative leadership

world_maestro.name: World Maestro
world_maestro.description: Conducts top orchestras globally. Commands rarefied fees and has a distinctive interpretive "voice" recognized worldwide.
world_maestro.flavor_text: Your name alone fills concert halls. The world's finest orchestras compete for your calendar.
world_maestro.example_achievement: Chief Conductor of the Berlin Philharmonic, known for meticulous preparation and transformative performances

grand_maestro.name: Grand Maestro
grand_maestro.description: Among the top 20 living conductors. Near-universal critical acclaim, regularly leads elite orchestras worldwide. Known for landmark recordings and signature interpretations.
grand_maestro.flavor_text: You stand among the titans. Your interpretations are studied, your recordings are definitive, your legacy is assured.
grand_maestro.example_achievement: Music Director of the Chicago Symphony, over 50 years of legendary performances across the globe

immortal_maestro.name: Titan of the Baton
immortal_maestro.description: The mythic peak—a once-in-a-generation artistic figure. Transformed the field's aesthetics, standards, and sound. Definitive recordings considered global references.
immortal_maestro.flavor_text: You have transcended conducting. Like Bernstein, Karajan, and Toscanini before you, your name will echo through the ages.
immortal_maestro.example_achievement: Transformed American classical music, legendary NY Philharmonic tenure, iconic educator and composer

standing_ovation.title: STANDING OVATION
standing_ovation.highest_rank: You have achieved the highest rank! A true Titan of the Baton.

slash_commands.compact: Summarize conversation to reduce context usage
slash_commands.cost: Show session cost and token usage
slash_commands.todos: Find and list TODO comments in codebase

mobile.zoom_out_hint: Double-tap or tap reset to zoom out
mobile.navigate_hint: Pinch to zoom • Swipe left/right to navigate • Swipe down to dismiss
mobile.dismiss_hint: Pinch to zoom • Swipe down to dismiss
